questions.question: When dividing $3.5$ by $0.05$, by how many places to the right must you shift the decimal points of both numbers?
questions.explanation: The divisor is $0.05$. It has 2 decimal places, so we must shift the decimal point 2 places to the right to turn it into the whole number 5.

questions.question: Calculate: $0.8 \div 0.2$
questions.explanation: Shift both decimal points 1 place to the right: $0.8 \div 0.2$ becomes $8 \div 2 = 4$.

questions.question: Calculate: $1.44 \div 1.2$
questions.explanation: Shift both decimal points 1 place to the right to make the divisor a whole number: $1.44 \div 1.2$ becomes $14.4 \div 12$. Dividing $14.4$ by $12$ yields $1.2$.

questions.question: Solve: $9 \div 0.3$
questions.explanation: Shift both decimal points 1 place to the right. $9$ becomes $90$, and $0.3$ becomes $3$. $90 \div 3 = 30$.

questions.question: Find the quotient: $0.075 \div 0.25$
questions.explanation: Shift both decimal points 2 places to the right to turn $0.25$ into $25$. $0.075$ becomes $7.5$. Dividing $7.5 \div 25$ yields $0.3$.
